name: Step
goal: Render a single numbered process step with a state-coded disk, title, optional meta line, and rich description slot.
description: A single step brick for process / roadmap / onboarding flows. Displays a 32px circle disk (number or check), a title row with optional inline metadata, and a description area. State enum (pending|active|done) drives disk color and title weight via CSS custom properties — no domain vocabulary in the enum (CDR-001). Default slot carries rich description content (CDR-002). Slot="title" overrides the title attribute for rich inline content. Can be used standalone or nested inside ce-steps (CDR-006); the parent auto-assigns n when auto-number is enabled.

props.name: n
props.description: Step number or letter rendered in the disk. Omit to hide the disk (standalone usage without numbering).

props.name: title
props.description: Plain-text step title. Slot="title" wins over this attribute for rich content (CDR-002).

props.name: state
props.description: Visual state driving disk color and title weight. CDR-001 finite 3-value style enum: pending=neutral, active=blue+bold, done=green+check.

slots.description: Description text or rich content (<a>, <code>, <ce-chip>, etc.). Hidden when empty.

slots.name: title
slots.description: Rich title override. Wins over the title attribute when supplied (CDR-002). Accepts inline elements and composed children.

slots.name: meta
slots.description: Optional metadata shown beside the title (e.g. '~2 weeks', 'Q3 2026'). Hidden when empty.

cssVariables.name: --ce-step-disk-size
cssVariables.description: Width and height of the numbered circle disk.

cssVariables.name: --ce-step-disk-bg
cssVariables.description: Disk background color; overridden per state.

cssVariables.name: --ce-step-disk-fg
cssVariables.description: Disk foreground (number / check) color; overridden per state.

cssVariables.name: --ce-step-gap
cssVariables.description: Gap between disk and body block.

cssVariables.name: --ce-muted
cssVariables.description: Default disk foreground and description text color.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-2
cssVariables.description: Gap between title and meta label.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-3
cssVariables.description: Default gap between disk and body.

a11y.notes: Number disk has aria-hidden='true' (decorative). state='active' sets aria-current='step' on host. state='done' prepends a visually-hidden 'Completed:' span before the title slot so screen readers announce completion. The sr-only span uses clip/overflow pattern (not display:none) so it is read aloud.
